project_context.app_name: The Doggy Company - Pet Life OS

headings.usage: Main headers, Section titles, Card titles

login_page.structure: Split Screen (50/50 on Desktop, Stacked on Mobile)

left_panel.content: High-quality lifestyle image of pet owner + pet
left_panel.overlay: Glassmorphism card with testimonial or brand promise

components.hero_card: col-span-full md:col-span-2 row-span-2 (Pet Portrait + Soul Score)

buttons.primary: bg-teal-600 hover:bg-teal-700 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-teal-500/30 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-gray-100 hover:border-teal-200 text-gray-700 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-gray-50 border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-teal-500 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-teal-500/10 rounded-xl h-12 transition-all

breed_autocomplete.style: Command Palette style. Floating or inline. Shows breed name + small paw icon.

login_hero.alt: Happy pet owner taking selfie with dog

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: Run 'npm install lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge cmdk' if missing.
2. FONT SETUP: Add 'Outfit' font from Google Fonts to index.css and tailwind.config.js.
3. LOGIN PAGE: Implement the Split Screen layout. Use the 'login_hero' image for the left side. Ensure the form is centered on the right.
4. MY PETS PAGE: Implement the Bento Grid layout. Use 'dashboard_pet_dog' and 'dashboard_pet_cat' as mock data images.
5. BREED AUTOCOMPLETE: Create a reusable 'BreedSelector' component using Shadcn Command or a custom input with a dropdown list. Mock a list of 20 common breeds.
6. ANIMATIONS: Apply 'animate-fade-in-up' to the dashboard cards for a staggered entrance.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid attributes to all inputs (email, password, breed-search) and buttons (login-submit, add-pet-btn).
universal_guidelines: Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
Ensure all text on colored backgrounds has sufficient contrast.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons (Paw, Activity, Calendar, Settings).
